svg.text: Real astrophysical BHs with SSBM-computed interior properties
Each one is a universe. Circle size ∝ log(r_s). Color = spectral position in the chiral funnel.
ξ = 0.1582 · σ_conv = 1.086 · T_crossing = 207 GeV · E_baby = ξMc² · τ = πGM/c³
Interior time spans 6 orders of magnitude. The conversion physics does not change.
From 139 microseconds (V404 Cygni) to 18 days (Phoenix A) — each one births a universe.
